title: Sustainable Development Goals (SDG) Funding Program – Contributions - Canada.ca
content:
## Sustainable Development Goals (SDG) Funding Program – Contributions

## Current status: Closed
Closed on January 22, 2024 at 11:59 p.m. Pacific Standard Time (PST)
This funding opportunity aims to  support the federal government’s implementation of the 2030 Agenda by  strengthening partnerships and engagement with Canadians. In 2015, Canada and  all other United Nations Member States, committed to implementing the 2030  Agenda for Sustainable Development, which set 17 Sustainable Development Goals  (SDGs) to eliminate poverty, protect the planet, and ensure prosperity by the  year 2030.
The Contributions stream of this Call  for Proposals (CFP) will fund projects that aim to localize SDGs in  communities.  Funded projects will adapt,  employ, and monitor progress of the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development at  the local level and will measure and report on the SDGs.
Application period: November 20, 2023 to January 22, 2024 at 11:59  pm, Pacific Standard Time (PST)
Funding amount: Up to $900,000 for a project that is up to 36  months (maximum $300,000 per fiscal year)
Who can apply: Not-for-profit organizations, municipalities, provincial and territorial governments, Indigenous organizations, coalitions, networks and committees, research organizations or institutes, educational, health, and social institutions, and for-profit organizations (with exceptions)

## Information sessions
We will hold information sessions to give an overview of this application process. You can take part online or by teleconference.
- December 4, 2023 at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Standard Time (French)
- December 5, 2023 at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Standard Time (English)
If you are interested, send an email to EDSC.ODD2030-2030SDG.ESDC@hrsdc-rhdcc.gc.ca by December 4, 2023 at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Standard Time (EST).
In your email, specify your preferred language (English or French) and if you need  accommodations. We will send you the  instructions on how to attend.

## Help and contact information

### Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)
What are grants and contributions?
When will I know if I'm approved for funding?
Enquiries will be answered between November 20, 2023 to January 18, 2024 at 3:00 p.m. EST.
Email: EDSC.ODD2030-2030SDG.ESDC@hrsdc-rhdcc.gc.ca

### Accessibility and disability help
If you need    help or accommodations, please contact us by January 15, 2024 at 3:00 p.m. EST.
Email: EDSC.ODD2030-2030SDG.ESDC@hrsdc-rhdcc.gc.ca

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
